changeSet.author: claude (P0-06)
changeSet.comment: Convert word_meta and translation_meta from VARCHAR(255) to json. Pre-existing rows must contain valid JSON (or NULL) for the cast to succeed.

sql.sql: ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN word_meta TYPE json USING word_meta::json; ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN translation_meta TYPE json USING translation_meta::json;
ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN word_meta TYPE VARCHAR(255) USING word_meta::text; ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN translation_meta TYPE VARCHAR(255) USING translation_meta::text;
